system.notes:
U.S. armed-forces powered armor (game rules in Maximum Metal; stats printed in Home of the Brave).

Manufacturer: Hughes/GE. Chassis: Highwayman, STR 35. Chassis weight: 180 kg. Capacity/carry: 1750 kg / 525 kg. Reflexes: High-Boost Reflexes. SIB/DFB: +3/+2. Punch 4D10, Kick 6D10, Crush 5D10. Toughness mod: -9. Trooper size: 115 kg. Total weight: 824 kg. Total cost: 211,600 eb.

Per-limb armor: all locations SP 40. Main/loadout: M-99 EVAW (SP 15 / SDP 10 / 10 kg); self-sealing compression suit; photon laser cannon; maneuver jets.

The per-location internal/external SDP and full weapon-slot loadout are printed as an interleaved grid; only cleanly readable cells are transcribed here. See Home of the Brave p.89 image for the complete grid.

needsEyes: Per-location internal/external SDP and full weapon-slot loadout: printed grid is column-interleaved in the text layer; not transcribed. Read from Home of the Brave p.89 image.
EVA per-limb SP: OCR text layer prints a truncated '4'; read as 40 (all sibling suits are SP 40-65; SP 4 is not viable for PA) per launch directive. Confirm at Home of the Brave p.89 image.
